headline: FedEx Corp. Board Declares Quarterly Dividend
summary: MEMPHIS, Tenn., June 08, 2026--The Board of Directors of FedEx Corp. (NYSE: FDX) today approved a 5% increase in the annual dividend rate on FedEx Corp. common stock, after a one-time annual rate adjustment in connection with the spin-off of FedEx Freight.

headline: Mark A. Edmunds Elected to FedEx Board of Directors
summary: MEMPHIS, Tenn., June 08, 2026--FedEx Corp. (NYSE: FDX, "FedEx") announced today that Mark A. Edmunds has been elected to the FedEx Board of Directors.

headline: FedEx, China Southern Airlines to explore cargo cooperation
summary: FedEx and China Southern Cargo promise to work together on finding joint cargo efficiencies. The post FedEx, China Southern Airlines to explore cargo cooperation appeared first on FreightWaves.
